scenario: Testing with a petite endurance athlete (155cm, 50kg) training for a marathon with vegan dietary restrictions
taskDescription: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
solutionCriteria: Includes breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All meals are vegan (no animal products)
Meal plan is appropriate for endurance training energy needs

scenario: Testing with a heavyweight powerlifter (195cm, 115kg) aiming for muscle gain with lactose intolerance and nut allergies
taskDescription: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
solutionCriteria: Includes breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks

Meal plan is high in protein for muscle gain
